prompt_text: compliance tools with native GitHub integration
response:
# Compliance Tools with Native GitHub Integration

## Top Solutions

### 1. **GitHub Advanced Security**
- **Built-in features:**
  - Secret scanning
  - Dependabot vulnerability alerts
  - Code scanning (SAST)
  - Supply chain security
- **No external tool needed** for basic compliance
- [GitHub Advanced Security Docs](https://docs.github.com/en/get-started/learning-about-github/about-github-advanced-security)

### 2. **Snyk**
- **Native GitHub integration:**
  - PR checks for vulnerabilities
  - Automatic fix PRs
  - License compliance scanning
  - SAST/DAST capabilities
- **Best for:** DevSecOps teams
- [Snyk GitHub Integration](https://snyk.io/partners/github/)

### 3. **Dependabot (GitHub Native)**
- **Integrated directly:**
  - Automatic dependency updates
  - Security alerts
  - Version updates
- **Free tier available**
- Built into every GitHub repo

### 4. **SonarQube / SonarCloud**
- **GitHub integration:**
  - PR decorations
  - Code quality gates
  - Security hotspots
  - Compliance reports
- **Works with:** GitHub Actions, GitHub Enterprise
- [SonarCloud](https://www.sonarsource.com/products/sonarcloud/)

### 5. **Checkmarx/Checkmarx One**
- **GitHub native:**
  - SAST, DAST, SCA
  - PR scanning
  - Supply chain security
- **Enterprise-grade compliance**

### 6. **GitGuardian**
- **Focused on:**
  - Secret detection
  - Incident response
  - Compliance (SOC2, GDPR)
- **Real-time scanning** of commits
- [GitGuardian](https://www.gitguardian.com/)

### 7. **Aqua Security**
- **Container & code security:**
  - Image scanning
  - Runtime protection
  - Compliance scanning (NIST, CIS)
- **GitHub Actions integration**

### 8. **HashiCorp Sentinel**
- **Policy as Code:**
  - IaC compliance
  - Governance automation
  - GitHub-native
- **Ideal for:** Infrastructure compliance

## Quick Comparison Table

| Tool | Secret Scanning | SAST | Dependencies | License Compliance | Ease of Setup |
|------|-----------------|------|--------------|-------------------|---------------|
| GitHub Advanced Security | ✅ | ✅ | ✅ | ❌ | ⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐ |
| Snyk | ✅ | ✅ | ✅ | ✅ | ⭐⭐⭐⭐ |
| SonarCloud | ❌ | ✅ | ⚠️ | ⚠️ | ⭐⭐⭐ |
| GitGuardian | ✅ | ❌ | ❌ | ❌ | ⭐⭐⭐⭐ |
| Dependabot | ❌ | ❌ | ✅ | ❌ | ⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐ |

## Implementation Path

```yaml
# Example: GitHub Actions workflow
name: Compliance Checks
on: [pull_request, push]

jobs:
  security:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@v3
      
      # Snyk scanning
      - uses: snyk/actions/setup@master
      - run: snyk test --severity-threshold=high
      
      # SonarCloud
      - uses: SonarSource/sonarcloud-github-action@master
      
      # GitGuardian
      - uses: GitGuardian/ggshield-action@master
        with:
          api-key: ${{ secrets.GITGUARDIAN_API_KEY }}
```

## Compliance Standards Covered

- **SOC2** → Snyk, GitGuardian
- **GDPR** → GitHub Advanced Security, Snyk
